heading: Counseling and job placement
label: 3199 Counseling and job placement
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first full program year after (), see , set out as a note under .July 22, 2014July 1, 2015section 506 of Pub. L. 113–128section 3101 of this title

children.heading: Assessment and counseling
children.label: a Assessment and counseling
children.text: The Secretary shall arrange for assessment and counseling for each enrollee at regular intervals to measure progress in the academic and career and technical education and training programs carried out through the Job Corps.

children.heading: Placement
children.label: b Placement
children.text: The Secretary shall arrange for assessment and counseling for enrollees prior to their scheduled graduations to determine their capabilities and, based on their capabilities, shall place the enrollees in employment leading to economic self-sufficiency for which the enrollees are trained or assist the enrollees in participating in further activities described in this part. In arranging for the placement of graduates in jobs, the Secretary shall utilize the one-stop delivery system to the maximum extent practicable.

children.heading: Status and progress
children.label: c Status and progress
children.text: The Secretary shall determine the status and progress of enrollees scheduled for graduation and make every effort to assure that their needs for further activities described in this part are met.

children.heading: Services to former enrollees
children.label: d Services to former enrollees
children.text: The Secretary may provide such services as the Secretary determines to be appropriate under this part to former enrollees.
